# _secretsDel

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the _secretsDel mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk secrets-del --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.databaseId <UUID> --input.secretName <String> --input.namespaceId <UUID>
```
